summary:
Implementation plan to revamp the English Vidya home page and footer:
1. Shrink/collapse the 'Connect with Us' section by nesting it inside the existing homepage morph cards accordion.
2. Clean up and organize the footer social icons into a neat 4x2 grid to prevent awkward wrapping.
3. Add a premium animated credit link for 'Master Manikant' with gradient shifts, hover glows, and transitions.
4. Improve the visual quality of the homepage (rating it from 6/10 to 9+/10) using modern gradients, glassmorphism, and micro-interactions.
